Off Calendar Aug-31-2016 Set For Trial On Apr-17-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-14-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2016 Continued To Sep-14-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Strike First Amended Complaint Of Plaintiff Merecedes Weatherford Against Defendant Michael Ma, In Whole Or In Part And Exhibit A
Off Calendar Jul-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Attorney, Eric Roland Wagner (855-529-4465), appears telephonically for plaintiff/opposing party, Mercedes Weatherford

Attorney, Amy E. Bracher (510-457-3468), appears for defendant/moving party, Michael Ma

The cause is argued by both sides. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT MICHAEL MA's Motion To Strike First Amended Complaint Of Plaintiff Merecedes Weatherford Against Defendant Michael Ma, In Whole Or In Part and Exhibit A is DENIED. The allegation that defendant Michael Ma drove a vehicle while intoxicated by alcohol and/or under the influence of controlled substances despite knowing that doing so was a safety hazard adequately alleges despicable conduct that is willful and in conscious disregard for the rights and safety of other others which supports a request for punitive damages. A written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (D302)
